auth.name: Name
auth.forgot_password_desc: Forgot your password? No problem. Just let us know your email address and we will email you a password reset link that will allow you to choose a new one.
auth.verify_email_desc: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
auth.verification_resent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.confirm_password_desc: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

profile.information_desc: Update your account's profile information and email address.
profile.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.password_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
profile.delete_account_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.delete_confirm_desc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

welcome.title: KPI Tool — Professional KPI Management
welcome.hero_desc: Professional KPI management with Excel-style spreadsheets, interactive charts, automated target generation, and real-time status tracking. Built for teams that take performance seriously.
welcome.features_desc: Powerful features to manage and monitor your business KPIs
welcome.feature_spreadsheet_desc: Monthly grid with inline editing for Actuals & Targets. Auto-calculated Difference and % Deviation with color-coded indicators.
welcome.feature_dashboard_desc: Summary cards, status doughnut chart, monthly bar chart, top KPIs, and recent entries — all at a glance.
welcome.feature_charts_desc: Trend line charts on KPI detail pages with color-coded status points showing performance over time.
welcome.feature_csv_desc: Export your spreadsheet data as CSV. Bulk-import KPI values per definition with a simple CSV upload.
welcome.feature_targets_desc: Auto-generate monthly targets with a custom growth rate formula.
welcome.feature_dark_desc: Full dark mode support with a one-click toggle. Persists across sessions via localStorage.
welcome.how_desc: Get up and running in minutes
welcome.step1_desc: Create KPI definitions with formulas, units, categories, and thresholds — or pick from 35+ ready-made templates.
welcome.step2_desc: Use the Excel-style spreadsheet or KPI detail page to enter actual values. Import in bulk via CSV.
welcome.step3_desc: View dashboard summaries, trend charts, and status indicators. Export reports as CSV anytime.
welcome.templates_desc: Start with professionally crafted KPI definitions across 6 categories
welcome.cta_desc: Create your account and start monitoring your business performance in minutes.
welcome.footer_tech: Built with Laravel, Vue.js & Tailwind CSS
